title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal's deployment of AI tools has accelerated development velocity, with high-adoption teams completing daily deployments and executing a large Java migration 6x faster. The organization projects 40% more capability delivery in 2026 from AI-assisted workflows.
